title: Emergency Treat Inventory
text:
## Emergency Treat Inventory

**Shelf:** {adjective} cabinet above the {place}

**Matilda:** Requires {number} {adjective} biscuits after any walk involving a {animal}.

**Violet:** Head cat demands {food} arranged {adverb} in the correct bowl.

**Zebby:** Black kitten accepts {food} only if served beside a {color} {object}, preferably not stolen from Violet.

**Baby Bear:** Needs honey, a {clothing item}, and one {adjective} spoon.

**Shortage plan:** If supplies run low, {verb} to the {place} while {verb ending in -ing}. Do not let anyone feel {emotion}.
